name: How to embed this video in your own web page

name: VOE streaming site nags users to disable their adblocker  - Reddit
snippet: Try watching a video they host without an adblocker. It's impossible. Popups and new tabs, pop-unders, fake closing buttons, fake chat windows.

name: <iframe>: el elemento Inline Frame - HTML - MDN Web Docs
snippet: El elemento HTML <iframe> (de inline frame) representa un contexto de navegación anidado, el cual permite incrustrar otra página HTML en la página actual.
